item.title: Downloading SSL certificate from a website
item.description: Source 1 2 3 echo -n | openssl s_client -connect $HOST:$PORTNUMBER -servername $SERVERNAME \ | openssl x509 > /tmp/$SERVERNAME.

item.title: git snippets
item.description: Amending changes in a commit without modifying the message 1 git commit -a --amend --no-edit Displaying only the files modified in a commit 1 git show --pretty="" --name-status <commit-ref> Browsing the repository on a local web interface 1 git instaweb (It requires [[lighttpd]] or other httpd daemon.

item.title: PostgreSQL
item.description: Client: psql To login with a specific username: psql -U <user> To login with username and password: 1 PGPASSWORD=<password> psql -U <user> ( Source)
